overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of a character in a futuristic suit exploring a dark industrial sci-fi facility. The character walks through corridors with mixed teal and yellow lighting, briefly enters a recreation room and red-lit emergency corridor, then descends a stairwell to lower levels B1 and B2.

scene_state.functional_zone: maintenance corridor with airlock doors and digital displays

events.description: corridor lighting shifts from warm yellow to cool teal neon strips

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the facility corridor toward the airlock door ahead

entered.detail: heavy industrial door with circular locking mechanism and warning stripes
illuminated screen showing facility information and status readouts
glowing cyan light strips running along wall edges and door frames
futuristic vending unit with 'OUT OF SERVICE' and 'FORT SOLIS' text visible

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a narrow industrial corridor with heavy airlock doors ahead. The lighting transitions from warm yellow to cool teal as the character passes digital displays and vending machines along the walls.

scene_state.functional_zone: crew recreation room transitioning to emergency red-lit corridor

events.description: enters open recreation room with pool table and lounge furniture
enters narrow corridor bathed in red emergency lighting
exits red corridor back to main teal-lit facility area

agents.ego_description: entering the recreation area, moving through the red-lit emergency section, and returning to the main corridor

entered.detail: rectangular pool table with blue surface in the center of the recreation room
sofa and chairs arranged in the crew relaxation area
intense red lights illuminating the emergency access corridor walls

segments.scene_description: The character enters a recreation room containing a pool table and lounge furniture, then proceeds into a narrow corridor with dramatic red emergency lighting before returning to the main facility corridors.

agents.ego_description: walking through the main facility corridors toward the B1 stairwell entrance

entered.detail: doorway leading to descending stairwell marked with B1 level signage
perforated metal flooring with red safety stripes near the stairwell

segments.scene_description: The character walks through the main teal-lit corridors, passing heavy airlock doors and digital displays, approaching the B1 stairwell entrance with metal grating floors.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial stairwell descending B1 to B2 maintenance level

events.description: begins descending the spiral stairwell from B1 level
reaches B2 level and enters dark maintenance corridor with industrial piping

agents.ego_description: descending the metal spiral stairwell and walking through the dark lower level maintenance corridor

entered.detail: metal spiral staircase with mesh caging and handrails descending between levels
yellow text marking the B1 level on the stairwell wall
yellow text marking the B2 level at the bottom of the stairwell
large pipes and conduits running along the dark maintenance corridor walls

segments.scene_description: The character descends a spiral metal stairwell from B1 to B2, passing level signage and mesh caging, then enters a dark industrial maintenance corridor with visible pipework and red accent lighting.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a futuristic industrial facility that shifts from brightly lit corridors to the dark, utilitarian depths of the lower levels. It begins in a narrow hallway where the lighting transitions from warm yellow to cool teal as the character passes digital displays and vending machines. The camera then follows the character into a recreation room with a pool table and lounge furniture before cutting through a corridor of dramatic red emergency lighting and returning to the main teal-lit facility. As the character continues past heavy airlock doors, the scene shifts toward the B1 stairwell entrance characterized by metal grating floors. Finally, the camera descends a spiral metal stairwell past level signage and mesh caging, entering a dark maintenance corridor filled with exposed pipework and red accent lighting.
